articles.title: Iran national anthem booed by sections of crowd before World Cup match
articles.description: Sections of the crowd at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California, were heard booing during the Iranian national anthem ahead of Iran's World Cup match against Belgium on June 21, 2026. Video from the stadium captures the reaction during the pre-match ceremony before the Group G fixture. The match was Iran's second game of the 2026 FIFA World Cup and was played in front of a large crowd at the Los Angeles-area venue.
